CustomField.description: The api name of the Limit to check. The list of API Names can be found here: https://developer.salesforce.com/docs/atlas.en-us.256.0.api_rest.meta/api_rest/resources_limits.htm
CustomField.inlineHelpText: The api name of the Limit to check. The list of API Names can be found here: https://developer.salesforce.com/docs/atlas.en-us.256.0.api_rest.meta/api_rest/resources_limits.htm
CustomField.label: Limit Name
